message:
refactor: replace dlopen with static linking for C extension modules

- Remove all dlopen/dlsym/dlclose calls from c_interop
- Add static module registry infrastructure in import.zig
- Remove unused c_interop.zig file
- Add documentation in build.zig for linking .so files

C extension modules (numpy, pandas) will now be statically linked
at compile time instead of dynamically loaded at runtime. This
provides better performance and removes runtime dependencies.

The static registry is currently empty - actual linking requires
adding .so files via addObjectFile() in build.zig.
